data.title: Altcoin Season Index Shows Recovery in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinmarketcap reveals that the Altcoin Season Index has risen to 41, after dropping to 35 on July 30. This index indicates that over the past 90 days, approximately 41 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The CMC Altcoin Season Index serves as a real-time indicator to assess whether the current cryptocurrency market is dominated by altcoins. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the last 90 days.

data.title: White House digital assets chief Bo Hines confirms strategic Bitcoin reserve plans
data.description:
The White House is still on course to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve, according to Bo Hines, Executive Director of the President’s Council of Advisers on Digital Assets. Hines confirmed that the reserve is not only being considered but is already in place despite only being briefly mentioned in Wednesday’s federal crypto strategy document. In […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bo-hines-confirms-strategic-btc-reserve-plan/

data.description:

data.title: XRP News: Expert Reveals Why August Is Important for Ripple Vs SEC Lawsuit
data.description:
Contrary to the speculation pertaining XRP news, Bill Morgan, a legal expert, confirmed that August 15 is not a resolution deadline in the Ripple vs. SEC case. Rather, he clarified that it is a procedural requirement after which both parties are to file a joint status with the appellate court
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/31/xrp-news-expert-reveals-why-august-is-important-for-ripple-vs-sec-lawsuit/

data.title: Whale Alert Identifies Dormant Bitcoin Transactions from Satoshi Era
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert announced on the X platform that two recent transactions involving 50 BTC each originated from dormant addresses. These addresses were mined towards the end of the active period of Bitcoin's creator, Satoshi Nakamoto, around block 54316. However, it is highly unlikely that these blocks were mined by Satoshi himself. Whale Alert plans to release a comprehensive list of blocks that may have been mined by Satoshi in the near future.

data.title: Shell Q2 earnings top forecasts even as profits slump year-over-year
data.description:
Shell outperformed Wall Street targets for the second quarter of 2025, but the company’s actual earnings still fell sharply compared to a year ago. On Thursday, the British energy firm said it posted $4. 26 billion in adjusted earnings between April and June, above the $3. 87 billion expected by analysts tracked by LSEG and even higher […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/shell-earnings-top-forecasts/

data.title: MEXC sees drop in fraud attempts as AI-led controls begin to bite
data.description:
While crypto exchanges globally continue to struggle with increasingly sophisticated scam tactics, MEXC claims it has managed to turn the tide — at least temporarily. According to a risk report shared with Cryptopolitan, MEXC blocked over 70,000 fraud attempts in the second quarter of 2025, marking a 12% decline compared to Q1. The majority of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mexc-sees-drop-in-fraud-attempts-as-ai-led-controls-begin-to-bite/

data.title: New SEC standard leans on CFTC and Coinbase to decide which digital assets get spot crypto ETFs
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) could soon approve spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs) for digital assets with a strong futures market presence. A recent filing from the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) offers new clues about how the agency may approach crypto ETF approvals in the future.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/new-sec-standard-leans-on-cftc-and-coinbase-to-decide-which-digital-assets-get-spot-crypto-etfs/
